repertoires.name: London System
repertoires.description: A solid system for White built around d4, Bf4 and the e3 c3 pawn triangle. The same setup works against almost any Black defense.

repertoires.name: Vienna Gambit
repertoires.description: An aggressive gambit for White starting with e4, Nc3 and f4. White offers a pawn to seize the center and attack along the f file.

repertoires.name: Caro-Kann
repertoires.description: A rock solid defense for Black against e4 based on c6 and d5. Black gets a healthy pawn structure and an active light squared bishop.

repertoires.name: Scandinavian
repertoires.description: A direct defense for Black that meets e4 with d5 on the first move. The classical Qa5 setup gives clear plans and an easy development scheme.
